'''Charr''' was the [[Senator/Legends|senator]] of the [[Corellian sector/Legends|Corellian sector]] in [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]] who believed the [[Galactic Alliance Guard]]'s roundup of Corellian citizens was an abuse of [[Rights of Sentience|sentient rights]].

{{Char-stub}}

*''[[Legacy of the Force: Bloodlines]]'' {{1st}}
